initiatives.label: Initiatives
initiatives.fill_all_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
initiatives.archive_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to archive the initiative? All your archived initiatives can be restored later.
initiatives.archive_description: Only completed or closed initiatives can be archived

toast.create_error: Failed to create initiative. Please try again!
toast.update_error: Failed to update initiative. Please try again!

archive.initiative_cannot_be_archived_in_this_st: Initiative cannot be archived in this state

restore.error: Initiative could not be restored. Please try again.

toast.project_update_error: Failed to update initiative projects. Please try again!
toast.epic_update_success: Epic{count, plural, one { added to Initiative successfully.} other {s added to Initiative successfully.}}
toast.epic_update_error: Epic addition to Initiative failed. Please try again later.
toast.state_update_error: Failed to update initiative state. Please try again!
toast.label_update_error: Failed to update initiative labels. Please try again!

general.title: Organize work at the highest level with Initiatives
general.description: When you need to organize work spanning several projects and teams, Initiatives come in handy. Connect projects and epics to initiatives, see automatically rolled up updates, and see the forests before you get to the trees.

search.title: No matching initiatives
search.description:
No initiatives detected with the matching criteria.
 Create a new initiative instead.
search.archived_description: No archived initiatives detected with the matching criteria.

not_found.title: Initiative does not exist
not_found.description: The initiative you are looking for does not exist, has been archived, or has been deleted.

epics.title: You don't have epics that match the filters you have applied.
epics.subHeading: To see all epics, clear all applied filters.

empty_state.title: No scope added to this initiative yet
empty_state.description: Link projects and epics and track that work in this space.
empty_state.description_projects: Link projects and track that work in this space.
empty_state.description_epics: Link epics and track that work in this space.

board.enable_project_states_description: Enable project states from workspace settings to use state-based grouping.

labels.heading: Labels
labels.description: Structure and organise your initiatives with labels.

delete_modal.title: Delete label
delete_modal.content: Are you sure you want to delete {labelName}? This will remove the label from all the initiatives and from any views where the label is being filtered upon.

toast.delete_error: Initiative label could not be deleted. Please try again.
